item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Disability Housing Standards
item.description:
👀 Disability Housing Standards

Section 504/Fair Housing accessibility 119th Congress: visitability standards · adaptive-reuse provisions · Olmstead implementation · cooperative-housing-trust accessibility. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 3 + Disability Benefits Modernization. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
